---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing component
labels: enhancement
---

**Which component?**
e.g. `@inkui-cli/select`

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why is this useful?**
What use case does it solve?

**Proposed API (optional)**
```tsx
<Select
  newProp="example"
/>
```
